evals.prompt: Run the self-fix loop until all GitHub Actions pass
evals.expected_output: Automated cycle of commit, push, monitor, analyze, fix, and retry until CI is fully green
assertions: quality gate runs before each commit
loop stops when all checks pass

evals.prompt: A CI failure occurs in a shell script, use the self-fix loop to resolve it
evals.expected_output: Shell script error diagnosed, shell-script-quality skill applied, fix committed and CI re-checked
assertions: correct skill is activated for the failure type
fix is validated locally before push

evals.prompt: The self-fix loop encounters the same error 3 times in a row, what happens
evals.expected_output: Loop pauses after 2+ similar errors, root cause diagnosis performed before further retries
assertions: self-fix threshold triggers after repeated errors
root cause is diagnosed before additional retries
loop does not exceed max retries without diagnosis
